name: al-amin
description: A high-end B2C E-commerce and Distributed Inventory Management System designed for professional operational control, flexible pricing, and smart logistics.

scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix client && npm install --prefix server
scripts.build: npm --prefix client run build && npm --prefix server run build
scripts.db:setup: npm --prefix server run prisma:generate && cd server && npx prisma migrate deploy && npx tsx prisma/seed.ts
scripts.test: npm --prefix client test && npm --prefix server test
